mechanism_narrative: Near-zero federal funds rates compress equity discount rates and lower borrowing costs for corporations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rates exceeding 9.0 percent indicate severe labor market deterioration that suppresses household consumption and corporate earnings, generating negative forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 65% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising industrial production and declining nonfarm payrolls demonstrates capital substitution for labor, which expands short-term profit margins and drives positive equity returns.
failure_condition: Interaction term coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample regression over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real consumer spending combined with stabilizing housing starts confirms broad-based demand recovery, generating positive short-term momentum in equity markets over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.02) when applied to late-cycle expansion regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Monthly inflation readings below 218.0 confirm disinflationary pressures that allow central banks to maintain accommodative policy, supporting positive equity valuations over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Inflation readings below threshold coincide with negative 60d returns in > 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month increases in total nonfarm payrolls reflect improving economic activity and wage growth, directly translating to higher corporate revenues and positive forward equity returns.
failure_condition: Rolling Rank IC for payroll changes remains below 0.01 over 5-year out-of-sample periods.

mechanism_narrative: Synchronized quarterly growth in real GDP and monthly real consumer spending confirms a broad demand expansion that lifts earnings expectations, driving positive forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint significance test (F-stat) for both proxies fails to reject null hypothesis in out-of-sample predictive regressions.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production index exceeding 95.0 signals capacity utilization recovery that reduces input bottlenecks and supports short-term earnings momentum, generating positive equity returns.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses to negative returns when applied to late-cycle supply constraint regimes.
